title: CSIAPPS REST API
text: following environment variables must set make requests CSIAPPS REST API: CSIAPPS_ACCESS_TOKEN: access token authenticating API requests. token necessary permissions access desired endpoints.

title: CSIAPPS REST API
text: csiapps includes generic make_request() function make requests CSIAPPS REST API. Please refer CSIAPPS Swagger documentation full details available endpoints, parameters, response formats. common use cases interacting API endpoints using csiapps.

title: CSIAPPS REST API
text: basic endpoint /api/csiauth// endpoint, can used check status user making request. endpoint requires authentication, request successful, indicates access token valid necessary permissions access REST API.

title: CSIAPPS REST API
text: ingest raw data warehouse, make POST request /api/warehouse/ingestion/primary/ endpoint. Users supply source (uuid) target table, list records ingested, (optionally) subject_field record can uniquely identified. records must comply schema defined target table.
code: result <- make_request(   endpoint = "api/warehouse/ingestion/primary/",   method = "POST",   body = list(     source = Sys.getenv("SOURCE_UUID"),     records = list(       list(id = "xxxx", ...),       list(id = "yyyy", ...),       ...     ),     subject_field = "id"   ) )

title: CSIAPPS REST API
text: retrieve data records warehouse, make API request /api/warehouse/data-records/ endpoint. required parameter source_uuid requested table, several optional parameters additional filtering. Note can set paginate argument TRUE retrieve records matching query parameters.
code: records <- make_request(     endpoint = "api/warehouse/data-records",     query = list(source_uuid = Sys.getenv("SOURCE_UUID")),     paginate = T     )

title: Developing Shiny Web Applications
text: following environment variables must set developing shiny web application within CSIAPPS ecosystem: CSIAPPS_CLIENT_ID: client ID application registered CSIAPPS. CSIAPPS_CLIENT_SECRET: client secret application registered CSIAPPS. CSIAPPS_REDIRECT_URL: URL application redirect authentication. CSIAPPS_SCOPE: (optional) scope authentication request.

title: Developing Shiny Web Applications
text: Suppose following shiny web application: migrate app within CSIAPPS ecosystem, can leverage several functions provided csiapps.
code: library(shiny)  df = faithful[, 2]  ui <- fluidPage(      titlePanel("Old Faithful Geyser Data"),      sidebarLayout(         sidebarPanel(             sliderInput("bins",                         "Number of bins:",                         min = 1,                         max = 50,                         value = 30)         ),          mainPanel(            plotOutput("distPlot")         )     ) )  server <- function(input, output) {      output$distPlot <- renderPlot({         bins <- seq(min(df), max(df), length.out = input$bins + 1)          hist(df, breaks = bins, col = 'darkgray', border = 'white',              xlab = 'Waiting time to next eruption (in mins)',              main = 'Histogram of waiting times')     }) }  shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)

title: Developing Shiny Web Applications
text: specify institute internal API calls made (authentication redirects) application using set_institute().
code: # institute can be set to one of "csiontario" or "csipacific" csiapps::set_institute("csiontario")

title: Developing Shiny Web Applications
text: run check_secrets() ensure environment variables required set. verbose argument, FALSE default, can set TRUE print values environment variables checked. check_secrets() throw error required environment variables present, making useful debugging.

title: Developing Shiny Web Applications
text: code defined outside used within server function, use global_wrapper() ensure accessible internal helper functions.

title: Developing Shiny Web Applications
text: ui page server function can simply wrapped ui_wrapper() server_wrapper(), respectively. convenience functions include additional code redirect application CSIAPPS user authentication provide aesthetic formatting.
code: # original code  ui <- ...  server <- ...  shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)  # wrapped code  shinyApp(ui = csiapps::ui_wrapper(ui), server = csiapps::server_wrapper(server))

title: Developing Shiny Web Applications
text: Therefore, full code app, migration, look like :
code: library(shiny) library(csiapps)  # CSIAPPS Setup set_institute("csiontario") check_secrets()  global_wrapper({   df = faithful[, 2] })  # Define UI for application that draws a histogram ui <- fluidPage(      titlePanel("Old Faithful Geyser Data"),      sidebarLayout(         sidebarPanel(             sliderInput("bins",                         "Number of bins:",                         min = 1,                         max = 50,                         value = 30)         ),          mainPanel(            plotOutput("distPlot")         )     ) )  # Define server logic required to draw a histogram server <- function(input, output) {      output$distPlot <- renderPlot({         bins <- seq(min(df), max(df), length.out = input$bins + 1)          # draw the histogram with the specified number of bins         hist(df, breaks = bins, col = 'darkgray', border = 'white',              xlab = 'Waiting time to next eruption (in mins)',              main = 'Histogram of waiting times')     }) }  # Run the application  shinyApp(ui = ui_wrapper(ui), server = server_wrapper(server))

what: Make an authenticated API request to CSIAPPS — make_request
title: Make an authenticated API request to CSIAPPS — make_request
text: Make authenticated API request CSIAPPS

title: Make an authenticated API request to CSIAPPS — make_request
code: make_request(   endpoint,   method = "GET",   body = NULL,   query = list(),   headers = list(),   token = Sys.getenv("CSIAPPS_ACCESS_TOKEN"),   timeout = 20L,   verbose = FALSE,   paginate = FALSE,   max_pages = 50 )

title: Make an authenticated API request to CSIAPPS — make_request
text: endpoint API endpoint path. method HTTP method. Defaults "GET" body Optional request body POST/PUT/PATCH requests; R object can serialized JSON query Optional list query parameters include request URL headers Optional list additional HTTP headers include request token Authentication token. attempt read CSIAPPS_ACCESS_TOKEN environment variable provided explicitly. timeout Request timeout seconds; defaults 20 verbose TRUE, prints request response details console debugging purposes paginate TRUE, attempt paginate results using "next" links API response. Defaults FALSE. max_pages Maximum number pages fetch paginate = TRUE; defaults 50 prevent infinite loops

title: Make an authenticated API request to CSIAPPS — make_request
text: List parsed API responses
